brand-story-bg-d4e5f6.query: Jewelry That Tells Your Story Velmora was born from a simple belief: luxury shouldn't be reserved for special occasions. We create demi-fine jewelry that bridges the gap between everyday wear and heirloom quality — pieces you'll reach for again and again.
